productDisplayName: Turtle Men Formal Navy Blue Tie, Cufflink and Pocket Square Combo Set

One set of these to match your crisp shirt and you're all ready to suit up! Be it dinner dates or business meetings, this set is your fail-safe formal accessory option.TieLength: 42.5"Navy blue and lavender tie made of blended fabricHas a diagonal striping patternLoop on tie inner to hold end in placeCufflinksWidth: 3"Matching rectangle cufflinks made of steel Hinged back to hold the cufflink in placePocket squareSquare handkerchief with a 10" widthMade of blended fabric with a matching patternTie and pocket square careDry clean only
